name: Web Researcher
description: Current Prometheus playbook for web_search, web_fetch_batch/web_fetch research, multi-engine search, source fetching, X/Twitter URL fetching, and escalation to browser/scraper tools when needed.

resources.description: Provider selection follow-up note: corrects Google site: testing, documents provider-selectable web_search tools, and explains Google 403 interpretation.
Live TinyFish web_search test notes and comparison against earlier Tavily/Brave behavior plus Google-provider caveats.
Example pattern for researching external design/UI systems and mapping them into Prometheus-native design workflows.
Dated provider-health snapshot: normal web search/fetch works; Google API key missing; xAI Live Search deprecated.
Routing note: use show_product_carousel for curated shopping/product research results.
X/Twitter media extraction pattern: use download_media when web_fetch doesn't capture video
